name: @quoin/tokens-open-props
description: Open Props (Adam Argyle / Chrome team) translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Open Props' gray-N scale powers neutrals; its named colour set powers status (red-7, green-7, etc.). Open Props ships hsl(); converted to OKLCH approximations here for consistency with the rest of the harvested set.
